overview.description: The iShares Large Cap Max Buffer Mar ETF (MMAX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to track the price return of the iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV) up to a cap, with 100% downside hedge over a one-year outcome period. The actively managed fund obtains exposure by holding IVV shares and options. MMAX was launched on Mar 31, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
